title: Content library
summary: Saved content, drafts, and moderation queues.

sections.title: Tabs
sections.markdown:
- **Content**: saved pages and posts
- **Drafts**: private working copies
- **Moderation**: items waiting for review

sections.title: Open and view
sections.markdown: Use the row to continue editing in the composer. Use separate actions to view or preview the saved item.

sections.title: Status
sections.markdown:
- **Published**: live on the public site
- **Unpublished**: saved but not live
- **Pending review**: waiting for moderation

Drafts are private working copies, not a public status.
